title: JPMorgan Crypto Ponzi Lawsuits Put Compliance And Valuation In Focus
summary: JPMorgan Chase, ticker NYSE:JPM, is facing multiple proposed class action lawsuits tied to an alleged $328 million crypto Ponzi scheme. Plaintiffs claim the bank did not stop or report suspicious transfers linked to a customer accused of running the fraud. The cases focus on the bank’s anti money laundering controls and its role in monitoring crypto related transactions flowing through traditional accounts.
